market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Premium 3 bedroom with fireplace & garden view
analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into our 3-bedroom luxury home where modern design meets timeless charm in this fully private escape for 4 guests. The standout stone fireplace creates an inviting focal point, perfect for cozy evenings in this exceptional property. While the market median price is £175, we offer superior space and comfort with all amenities included. Enjoy the unique combination of elegant interiors and thoughtful design features that justify the premium pricing. The high occupancy gap (15.2% booked vs market average 28.3%) means you'll have prime availability during your stay. Our 4.96 star rating (417 reviews) confirms consistent satisfaction with stays here. Please note the competitive pricing context: our rate is significantly higher than the median but offers unparalleled space and luxury. [Continue to highlight specific space features, views, and location advantages not mentioned in original listing]
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the fireplace as cover photo since it's the most unique selling point mentioned in title and description
key_diagnosis: Pricing is 560% above median (£1155 vs £175) but occupancy is 45% below median (15.2% vs 28.3%)
Description is entirely missing - 200+ words of content lost to justify high rate
Title doesn't use high-value categories from strategy: outdoor, parking, entertainment
analysis.outreach_hook: Your premium rate is 560% above the median but occupancy is 45% below market average - we can close this gap with strategic optimizations.
